chat_history.assistant_message: I can help you with many things! I can answer questions, tell stories, explain tricky ideas, and help you learn new stuff. I can also help write stories, poems, or even thank-you notes. If you have a homework problem or want to know about animals, science, or history, just ask!

content.text: I can help you with many things! I can answer questions, tell stories, explain tricky ideas, and help you learn new stuff. I can also help write stories, poems, or even thank-you notes. If you have a homework problem or want to know about animals, science, or history, just ask!
